qry:select.name: qryHeadFoot
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT EB.c_convenio, EB.d_cuenta FROM LIQ15_EMPRESA_BCOS as EB WHERE EB.oi_empresa = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_empresa %} and EB.oi_banco = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_banco %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryHeadTot
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(TLP.n_totpag) as totpag, COUNT(TLP.n_totpag) as totreg
FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ22_BANCOS as B, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as L25, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJE, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO
JOIN PE.c_banco INNER B.c_banco, L25.e_secuencia INNER EJE.e_secuencia, L25.oi_liquidacion INNER EJE.oi_liquidacion, EMP.e_numero_legajo INNER PE.e_numero_legajo, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER EJE.oi_liquidacion_ddo, TLP.e_secuencia INNER L25.e_secuencia, EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER L25.oi_personal_emp, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.c_forma_pago INNER TLP.c_forma_pago
WHERE
B.oi_banco = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_banco %} AND L25.oi_liquidacion IN ({%= STRING(#SOURCE:LIQS/LIQ/@oi_liquidacion) %}) and PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.l_banco = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT TLP.n_totpag, PE.d_ape_y_nom, PE.c_cta_bancaria FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ22_BANCOS as B, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as L25, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJE, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO
JOIN PE.c_banco INNER B.c_banco, L25.e_secuencia INNER EJE.e_secuencia, L25.oi_liquidacion INNER EJE.oi_liquidacion, EMP.e_numero_legajo INNER PE.e_numero_legajo, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER EJE.oi_liquidacion_ddo, TLP.e_secuencia INNER L25.e_secuencia, EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER L25.oi_personal_emp, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.c_forma_pago INNER TLP.c_forma_pago WHERE
B.oi_banco = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_banco %} AND L25.oi_liquidacion IN ({%= STRING(#SOURCE:LIQS/LIQ/@oi_liquidacion) %}) and PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.l_banco = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

EMPTY.mess: No se encontraron registros. Por favor valide que los legajos estestén asociados al banco correcto y que las liquidaciones del período estén cerradas.
